evals.title: Traffic drop diagnosis
evals.prompt: Our B2B SaaS site traffic dropped 40% this week compared to last week. We're based in Japan. It's the first week of May. What should I check?
evals.expected_behavior: Should immediately identify Golden Week as the most likely cause for a B2B site, then provide a systematic diagnostic checklist starting with seasonality check before investigating technical issues.

evals.title: Channel performance analysis
evals.prompt: I want to understand which marketing channels are driving the most value. We run Google Ads, LINE Ads, and organic SEO. Can you help me analyze?
evals.expected_behavior: Should recommend channel-level analysis using sessionDefaultChannelGroup, then drill into source/medium. Should explain session-scoped vs first-user-scoped dimensions for proper attribution.

evals.title: Funnel analysis for e-commerce
evals.prompt: We have an e-commerce site selling Japanese crafts. Our add-to-cart rate is decent but purchase completion is low. Help me analyze the checkout funnel.
evals.expected_behavior: Should recommend Funnel Exploration with closed funnel type, suggest segmenting by device and channel, and provide specific steps to identify where drop-off occurs.

evals.title: Monthly report creation
evals.prompt: My CEO wants a monthly marketing report. What should I include and how should I structure it?
evals.expected_behavior: Should provide a structured report template with executive summary, key metrics with period comparison, channel ROI, funnel analysis, and actionable recommendations. Should emphasize insights over raw data.

evals.title: Attribution model comparison
evals.prompt: We spend ¥2M/month on ads across Google and Meta. How do I know which channel actually drives conversions? GA4 shows different numbers depending on where I look.
evals.expected_behavior: Should explain DDA vs last-click, mention the 400 conversion threshold for DDA to work, recommend Model Comparison report, and explain session vs first-user scoped dimension differences.
